mutation: composite: prize-collecting/selective pickup-delivery single-vehicle TSP with capacity batching -- choose which precedence-constrained pairs to serve and order them to minimize travel plus skip-penalties
title: Vaccine Cold-Chain Milk Run: Selective Pickup-and-Delivery Tour
strategies: serve-nobody baseline: output an empty tour, cost = total penalty (calibration point)
standalone-benefit greedy: serve requests whose penalty exceeds their solo round-trip cost, serialized in benefit order
cheapest-insertion selection + feasibility-checked 2-opt: insert profitable pairs at least-cost positions respecting precedence & capacity, then locally reorder to batch pickups/deliveries
penalty-driven subset reoptimization: alternate re-selecting the served set and re-routing (local search) to trade travel against skipped-request penalties
